arts.ttl: Milan edge closer to qualification after victory over Girona
arts.sum: Rafael Leao's first-half goal was enough for AC Milan to beat Girona and edge closer to automatic qualification for the last 16 of the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Leão earns AC Milan narrow win over Girona
arts.sum: A first-half goal by winger Rafael Leao helped AC Milan to a 1-0 home win against Girona in the Champions League on Wednesday, leaving the Italians well-placed to book a spot in the last 16.

arts.ttl: Champions League | Milan 1-0 Girona: Match Report
arts.sum: AC Milan clinched a hard-fought 1-0 victory against Girona in a tense Champions League encounter, securing their fifth consecutive European win under new coach Sergio Conceicao. The post Champions League | Milan 1-0 Girona: Match Report appeared first on FootItalia.com.
